# Muthu Dental Clinic

> Premium, painless dental care in Panruti, Tamil Nadu, led by Dr. Akash M. (BDS, MRD). Modern equipment, gentle hands, family-friendly experience.

Muthu Dental Clinic is located at 25, Cuddalore Main Road, opposite Gandhi Park, Panruti — 607106. Bookings via WhatsApp (+91 7338726004) or in-clinic.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, services, doctor profile, testimonials, booking.
- [About](/about): Dr. Akash M. — credentials, philosophy, clinic story.
- [Services](/services): Full list of dental treatments offered.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Reception, treatment room, doctor's desk.
- [Tips](/tips): Practical dental-health articles from Dr. Akash.
- [Contact](/contact): Address, phone, hours, FAQ, online booking.
